strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Direct match on primary stack (TypeScript/Node/React) plus AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current role
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops on testing
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java mentioned only in older robotics/mobile tooling contexts
Cloud experience narrow — AWS CDK mentioned, but no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well above the 6+ year bar, with strong alignment to the primary TypeScript/Node/React stack and current hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly matches a stated requirement. Engineering craftsmanship, testing discipline, and breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems are clear strengths. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js experience and only legacy exposure to Kotlin/Java, which may require ramp-up on select backend services.
